title: Promoting safe relationships - Canada.ca
content:
## Promoting safe relationships
Family violence can be prevented-it can be stopped before it occurs and prevented from reoccurring. Promoting stable bonds between parents and children, fostering safe relationships between intimate partners and supporting mental health and resilience in everyone all play an important role in the prevention of family violence.
Learn about promoting:
- Stable and positive parenting
- Mental health and resilience
- Resources to keep children safe online
- Need help dealing with family violence?
- Learn about family violence
- Resources for professionals
- Promoting safe relationships
- Funding opportunities
- Provinces and Territories
